notes: As previously mentioned, the game works once WMV playback is disabled. Moving or removing the Video folders did not work for me, but editing the EXE files with hexedit did the trick. Find hex string ""57 4d 56 00 00 00 00 2e" and replace "57 4d 56" with something else.
title: Devil May Cry HD Collection

notes: Launcher for HD collection works, launching DMC 3 crashes. Will go on further configuration later on.
